2605.11906.title: YFPO: A Preliminary Study of Yoked Feature Preference Optimization with Neuron-Guided Rewards for Mathematical Reasoning
2605.11906.paper_summary: Preference optimization has become an important post-training paradigm for improving the reasoning abilities of large language models. Existing methods typically rely on externally constructed preference data, using preferred and dispreferred responses as sample-level supervision. However, such external signals rarely make explicit use of capability-related information contained in the model's internal representations. For mathematical reasoning, certain neuron groups may exhibit activation patterns associated with mathematical knowledge, symbolic manipulation, or logical reasoning. Similar to reflexive behavioral signals, these internal activations may provide a coarse indication of whether the model is engaging math-related capabilities.We introduce YFPO, short for Yoked Feature Preference Optimization, a preliminary neuron-guided preference optimization framework for mathematical reasoning. YFPO first uses AttnLRP to identify math-related neurons, and then constructs an auxiliary reward from their activation margin between preferred and dispreferred responses. This design augments external preference learning with internal neuron-level signals. We conduct preliminary experiments on a small-scale language model using GSM8K as the main benchmark. Results suggest that neuron-level signals can interact with preference optimization and occasionally improve reasoning performance, offering a promising direction for more fine-grained and interpretable reasoning-oriented post-training.
2605.11906.paper_summary_zh: 偏好優化已成為提升大型語言模型推理能力的重要後訓練範式。現有的方法通常依賴外部構建的偏好數據，使用偏好和不偏好的回應作為樣本級監督。然而，這些外部信號很少明確利用模型內部表徵中包含的能力相關信息。對於數學推理，某些神經元群可能會顯示與數學知識、符號操作或邏輯推理相關的激活模式。類似於反射行為信號，這些內部激活可能提供一個粗略的指示，表明模型是否在運用與數學相關的能力。我們介紹 YFPO，即耦合特徵偏好優化，這是一個初步的神經元引導偏好優化框架，用於數學推理。YFPO 首先使用 AttnLRP 來識別與數學相關的神經元，然後根據它們在偏好和不偏好回應之間的激活邊際構建輔助獎勵。這一設計將外部偏好學習與內部神經元級信號相結合。我們在一個小型語言模型上進行了初步實驗，以 GSM8K 作為主要基準。結果表明，神經元級信號可以與偏好優化互動，並偶爾改善推理性能，為更細緻且可解釋的推理導向後訓練提供了一個有希望的方向。
2605.11906.author: Yifan Le et.al.
